name: @guiderails/storybook-addon
description: Storybook addon: an agent's-eye-view panel and per-story Guiderails criterion checks that fail CI exactly as a11y regressions do. The check engine is renderer-agnostic (works on any rendered DOM) and pure-tested with jsdom; the Storybook panel + Playwright test-runner are the delivery wrapper (D-013, D-021).
